sourceSummary.oneLine: ADI_GATE circuit schematic, revision 006, dated Thursday, September 06, 2018.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Circuit diagram material for product safety/regulatory submission package.
keyPoints: Revision history lists V004 on 2018.6.17, V005 on 2018.7.24, and V006 on 2018.9.6.
The schematic is an A3 document with 8 sheets.
Gate-related supply rails and signals include VGH, VGL, 3.3V, 3.1V, -8V, -10V, L3.3V_GATE, N5V_GATE, L15V_GATE, GD_OE1, GD_OE2, GD_CPV, GD_LR, GD_CS1, and GD_CS2.
Repeated 50-pin connector blocks CON1 through CON6 identify signals including GUARD, VSRI, VEE, VGG, VCC, GND, STV, CPV, OE, XAO, UD, LR, and chip-select pins.
